name: tesla-fleet-api

metadata.name: tesla-fleet-api
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tesla Fleet API library for Python

documentation:
# Tesla Fleet Api
Python library for Tesla Fleet API and Teslemetry.

Currently does not support the end to end encrypted telemetry or command API.

Based on [Tesla Developer documentation](https://developer.tesla.com/docs/fleet-api).


## TeslaFleetApi
This is the base class, however can also be used directly if you have a valid user access_token.

```
import asyncio
import aiohttp

from tesla_fleet_api import TeslaFleetApi
from tesla_fleet_api.exceptions import TeslaFleetError


async def main():
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
        api = TeslaFleetApi(
            access_token="<access_token>",
            session=session,
            region="na",
        )

        try:
            data = await api.vehicle.list()
            print(data)
        except TeslaFleetError as e:
            print(e)

asyncio.run(main())
```

## TeslaFleetOAuth
This extends TeslaFleetApi to support OAuth, and requires a client_id, and either a refresh_token or initial authentication code.

```
from tesla_fleet_api import TeslaFleetOAuth
from tesla_fleet_api.exceptions import TeslaFleetError
import json

async def main():
    with open("auth.json", "r") as f:
        auth = json.load(f)
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
        api = TeslaFleetOAuth(
            session,
            client_id=<client_id>,
            access_token=auth["access_token"],
            refresh_token=auth["refresh_token"],
            expires=auth["expires"],
            region="na",
        )
        try:
            data = await api.vehicle.list()
            print(data)
        except TeslaFleetError as e:
            print(e)

    with open("auth.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump(
            {
                "access_token": api.access_token,
                "refresh_token": api.refresh_token,
                "expires": api.expires,
            },
            f,
        )

asyncio.run(main())
```

## Teslemetry
This extends TeslaFleetApi to send requests through Teslemetry, which manages all aspects of Tesla OAuth. This class only requires an access_token from the Teslemetry console.

```
import asyncio
import aiohttp

from tesla_fleet_api import Teslemetry
from tesla_fleet_api.exceptions import TeslaFleetError


async def main():
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
        api = Teslemetry(
            access_token="<access_token>",
            session=session,
        )

        try:
            data = await api.vehicle.list()
            print(data)
        except TeslaFleetError as e:
            print(e)

asyncio.run(main())
```

## Tessie
This extends TeslaFleetApi to send requests through Tessie, which manages all aspects of Tesla OAuth. This class only requires an access_token from [Tessie](https://dash.tessie.com/settings/api).

```
import asyncio
import aiohttp

from tesla_fleet_api import Tessie
from tesla_fleet_api.exceptions import TeslaFleetError


async def main():
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
        api = Tessie(
            access_token="<access_token>",
            session=session,
        )

        try:
            data = await api.vehicle.list()
            print(data)
        except TeslaFleetError as e:
            print(e)

asyncio.run(main())
```

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.cancel_software_update
documentation: Cancels the countdown to install the vehicle software update.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.charge_max_range
documentation: Charges in max range mode -- we recommend limiting the use of this mode to long trips.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.charge_port_door_close

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.charge_port_door_open

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.clear_pin_to_drive_admin
documentation: Deactivates PIN to Drive and resets the associated PIN for vehicles running firmware versions 2023.44+. This command is only accessible to fleet managers or owners.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.door_lock
documentation: Locks the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.door_unlock
documentation: Unlocks the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.erase_user_data
documentation: Erases user's data from the user interface. Requires the vehicle to be in park.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.flash_lights
documentation: Briefly flashes the vehicle headlights. Requires the vehicle to be in park.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.guest_mode
documentation: Restricts certain vehicle UI functionality from guest users

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.honk_horn
documentation: Honks the vehicle horn. Requires the vehicle to be in park.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.media_next_fav
documentation: Advances media player to next favorite track.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.media_next_track
documentation: Advances media player to next track.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.media_prev_fav
documentation: Advances media player to previous favorite track.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.media_prev_track
documentation: Advances media player to previous track.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.media_toggle_playback
documentation: Toggles current play/pause state.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.media_volume_down
documentation: Turns the volume down by one.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.navigation_gps_request
documentation: Start navigation to given coordinates. Order can be used to specify order of multiple stops.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.navigation_request
documentation: Sends a location to the in-vehicle navigation system.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.navigation_sc_request
documentation: Sends a location to the in-vehicle navigation system.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.remote_auto_seat_climate_request
documentation: Sets automatic seat heating and cooling.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.remote_auto_steering_wheel_heat_climate_request
documentation: Sets automatic steering wheel heating on/off.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.remote_boombox
documentation: Plays a sound through the vehicle external speaker.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.remote_seat_cooler_request
documentation: Sets seat cooling.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.remote_seat_heater_request
documentation: Sets seat heating.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.remote_start_drive
documentation: Starts the vehicle remotely. Requires keyless driving to be enabled.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.remote_steering_wheel_heat_level_request
documentation: Sets steering wheel heat level.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.remote_steering_wheel_heater_request
documentation: Sets steering wheel heating on/off. For vehicles that do not support auto steering wheel heat.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.reset_pin_to_drive_pin
documentation: Removes PIN to Drive. Requires the car to be in Pin to Drive mode and not in Valet mode. Note that this only works if PIN to Drive is not active. This command also requires the Tesla Vehicle Command Protocol - for more information, please see refer to the documentation here.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.reset_valet_pin
documentation: Removes PIN for Valet Mode.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.schedule_software_update
documentation: Schedules a vehicle software update (over the air "OTA") to be installed in the future.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_bioweapon_mode
documentation: Turns Bioweapon Defense Mode on and off.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_cabin_overheat_protection
documentation: Sets the vehicle overheat protection.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_charge_limit
documentation: Sets the vehicle charge limit.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_charging_amps
documentation: Sets the vehicle charging amps.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_climate_keeper_mode
documentation: Enables climate keeper mode.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_cop_temp
documentation: Adjusts the Cabin Overheat Protection temperature (COP).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_pin_to_drive
documentation: Sets a four-digit passcode for PIN to Drive. This PIN must then be entered before the vehicle can be driven.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_preconditioning_max
documentation: Sets an override for preconditioning — it should default to empty if no override is used.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_scheduled_charging
documentation: Sets a time at which charging should be completed. The time parameter is minutes after midnight (e.g: time=120 schedules charging for 2:00am vehicle local time).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_scheduled_departure
documentation: Sets a time at which departure should be completed. The time parameter is minutes after midnight (e.g: time=120 schedules departure for 2:00am vehicle local time).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_sentry_mode
documentation: Enables and disables Sentry Mode. Sentry Mode allows customers to watch the vehicle cameras live from the mobile app, as well as record sentry events.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_temps
documentation: Sets the driver and/or passenger-side cabin temperature (and other zones if sync is enabled).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_valet_mode
documentation: Turns on Valet Mode and sets a four-digit passcode that must then be entered to disable Valet Mode.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.set_vehicle_name
documentation: Changes the name of a vehicle. This command also requires the Tesla Vehicle Command Protocol - for more information, please see refer to the documentation here.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.speed_limit_activate
documentation: Activates Speed Limit Mode with a four-digit PIN.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.speed_limit_clear_pin
documentation: Deactivates Speed Limit Mode and resets the associated PIN.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.speed_limit_clear_pin_admin
documentation: Deactivates Speed Limit Mode and resets the associated PIN for vehicles running firmware versions 2023.38+. This command is only accessible to fleet managers or owners.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.speed_limit_deactivate
documentation: Deactivates Speed Limit Mode.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.speed_limit_set_limit
documentation: Sets the maximum speed allowed when Speed Limit Mode is active.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.sun_roof_control
documentation: Controls the panoramic sunroof on the Model S.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.take_drivenote
documentation: Records a drive note. The note parameter is truncated to 80 characters in length.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.trigger_homelink
documentation: Turns on HomeLink (used to open and close garage doors).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.upcoming_calendar_entries
documentation: Upcoming calendar entries stored on the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.window_control
documentation: Control the windows of a parked vehicle. Supported commands: vent and close. When closing, specify lat and lon of user to ensure they are within range of vehicle (unless this is an M3 platform vehicle).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.drivers
documentation: Returns all allowed drivers for a vehicle. This endpoint is only available for the vehicle owner.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.drivers_remove
documentation: Removes driver access from a vehicle. Share users can only remove their own access. Owners can remove share access or their own.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.mobile_enabled
documentation: Returns whether or not mobile access is enabled for the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.nearby_charging_sites
documentation: Returns the charging sites near the current location of the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.options
documentation: Returns vehicle option details.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.recent_alerts
documentation: List of recent alerts

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.release_notes
documentation: Returns firmware release notes.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.service_data
documentation: Returns service data.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.share_invites
documentation: Returns the share invites for a vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.share_invites_create
documentation: Creates a share invite for a vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.share_invites_redeem
documentation: Redeems a share invite.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.share_invites_revoke
documentation: Revokes a share invite.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.signed_command
documentation: Signed Commands is a generic endpoint replacing legacy commands.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.vehicle
documentation: Returns information about a vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.vehicle_data
documentation: Makes a live call to the vehicle. This may return cached data if the vehicle is offline. For vehicles running firmware versions 2023.38+, location_data is required to fetch vehicle location. This will result in a location sharing icon to show on the vehicle UI.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.wake_up
documentation: Wakes the vehicle from sleep, which is a state to minimize idle energy consumption.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.warranty_details
documentation: Returns warranty details.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclespecific.VehicleSpecific.fleet_status
documentation: Checks whether vehicles can accept Tesla commands protocol for the partner's public key

documentation: Configures fleet telemetry.

documentation: Configures fleet telemetry.

documentation: Configures fleet telemetry.

documentation: Sign and send a message to Infotainment computer.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned._sendInfotainment
documentation: Sign and send a message to Infotainment computer.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned._send
documentation: Send a signed message to the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.actuate_trunk
documentation: Controls the front or rear trunk.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.adjust_volume
documentation: Adjusts vehicle media playback volume.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.auto_conditioning_start
documentation: Starts climate preconditioning.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.auto_conditioning_stop
documentation: Stops climate preconditioning.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.cancel_software_update
documentation: Cancels the countdown to install the vehicle software update.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.charge_max_range
documentation: Charges in max range mode -- we recommend limiting the use of this mode to long trips.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.charge_port_door_close
documentation: Closes the charge port door.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.charge_port_door_open
documentation: Opens the charge port door.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.charge_standard
documentation: Charges in Standard mode.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.charge_start
documentation: Starts charging the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.charge_stop
documentation: Stops charging the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.clear_pin_to_drive_admin
documentation: Deactivates PIN to Drive and resets the associated PIN for vehicles running firmware versions 2023.44+. This command is only accessible to fleet managers or owners.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.door_lock
documentation: Locks the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.door_unlock
documentation: Unlocks the vehicle.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.erase_user_data
documentation: Erases user's data from the user interface. Requires the vehicle to be in park.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.flash_lights
documentation: Briefly flashes the vehicle headlights. Requires the vehicle to be in park.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.guest_mode
documentation: Restricts certain vehicle UI functionality from guest users

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.honk_horn
documentation: Honks the vehicle horn. Requires the vehicle to be in park.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.media_next_fav
documentation: Advances media player to next favorite track.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.media_next_track
documentation: Advances media player to next track.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.media_prev_fav
documentation: Advances media player to previous favorite track.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.media_prev_track
documentation: Advances media player to previous track.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.media_toggle_playback
documentation: Toggles current play/pause state.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.media_volume_down
documentation: Turns the volume down by one.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.media_volume_up
documentation: Turns the volume up by one.
This one is new

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.remote_auto_seat_climate_request
documentation: Sets automatic seat heating and cooling.
navigation_gps_request doesnt require signing
navigation_request doesnt require signing
navigation_sc_request doesnt require signing

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.remote_seat_cooler_request
documentation: Sets seat cooling.
remote_auto_steering_wheel_heat_climate_request has no protobuf
remote_boombox not implemented

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.remote_seat_heater_request
documentation: Sets seat heating.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.remote_start_drive
documentation: Starts the vehicle remotely. Requires keyless driving to be enabled.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.remote_steering_wheel_heat_level_request
documentation: Sets steering wheel heat level.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.remote_steering_wheel_heater_request
documentation: Sets steering wheel heating on/off. For vehicles that do not support auto steering wheel heat.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.reset_pin_to_drive_pin
documentation: Removes PIN to Drive. Requires the car to be in Pin to Drive mode and not in Valet mode. Note that this only works if PIN to Drive is not active. This command also requires the Tesla Vehicle Command Protocol - for more information, please see refer to the documentation here.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.reset_valet_pin
documentation: Removes PIN for Valet Mode.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.schedule_software_update
documentation: Schedules a vehicle software update (over the air "OTA") to be installed in the future.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_bioweapon_mode
documentation: Turns Bioweapon Defense Mode on and off.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_cabin_overheat_protection
documentation: Sets the vehicle overheat protection.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_charge_limit
documentation: Sets the vehicle charge limit.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_charging_amps
documentation: Sets the vehicle charging amps.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_climate_keeper_mode
documentation: Enables climate keeper mode.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_cop_temp
documentation: Adjusts the Cabin Overheat Protection temperature (COP).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_pin_to_drive
documentation: Sets a four-digit passcode for PIN to Drive. This PIN must then be entered before the vehicle can be driven.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_preconditioning_max
documentation: Sets an override for preconditioning — it should default to empty if no override is used.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_scheduled_charging
documentation: Sets a time at which charging should be completed. The time parameter is minutes after midnight (e.g: time=120 schedules charging for 2:00am vehicle local time).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_scheduled_departure
documentation: Sets a time at which departure should be completed. The time parameter is minutes after midnight (e.g: time=120 schedules departure for 2:00am vehicle local time).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_sentry_mode
documentation: Enables and disables Sentry Mode. Sentry Mode allows customers to watch the vehicle cameras live from the mobile app, as well as record sentry events.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_temps
documentation: Sets the driver and/or passenger-side cabin temperature (and other zones if sync is enabled).

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_valet_mode
documentation: Turns on Valet Mode and sets a four-digit passcode that must then be entered to disable Valet Mode.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.set_vehicle_name
documentation: Changes the name of a vehicle. This command also requires the Tesla Vehicle Command Protocol - for more information, please see refer to the documentation here.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.speed_limit_activate
documentation: Activates Speed Limit Mode with a four-digit PIN.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.speed_limit_clear_pin
documentation: Deactivates Speed Limit Mode and resets the associated PIN.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.speed_limit_deactivate
documentation: Deactivates Speed Limit Mode.
speed_limit_clear_pin_admin doesnt require signing

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.speed_limit_set_limit
documentation: Sets the maximum speed allowed when Speed Limit Mode is active.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.sun_roof_control
documentation: Controls the panoramic sunroof on the Model S.

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.trigger_homelink
documentation: Turns on HomeLink (used to open and close garage doors).
take_drivenote doesnt require signing

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.window_control
documentation: Control the windows of a parked vehicle. Supported commands: vent and close. When closing, specify lat and lon of user to ensure they are within range of vehicle (unless this is an M3 platform vehicle).
upcoming_calendar_entries doesnt require signing

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.nearby_charging_sites
documentation: Returns the charging sites near the current location of the vehicle.
drivers doesnt require signing
drivers_remove doesnt require signing
mobile_enabled

methods.name: tesla_fleet_api.vehiclesigned.VehicleSigned.fleet_telemetry_config_create
documentation: Configures fleet telemetry.
options doesnt require signing
recent_alerts doesnt require signing
release_notes doesnt require signing
service_data doesnt require signing
share_invites doesnt require signing
share_invites_create doesnt require signing
share_invites_redeem doesnt require signing
share_invites_revoke doesnt require signing
signed command doesnt require signing
vehicle doesnt require signing
vehicle_data doesnt require signing
wake_up doesnt require signing

Class describing the Tesla Fleet API vehicle endpoints and commands for a specific vehicle with command signing.
